reason: Add import for CoordinationClaimTable to fix db.file_path and db.task_id type errors
Fix Effect return type to include DatabaseAdapter.Service context, fix db.file_path to use CoordinationClaimTable columns, remove unreachable dead code
Fix git.branch() to pass cwd (ctx.directory) and fix return type (string|undefined, not {current:string}). Fix git.status() to pass cwd and fix return type (Item[], not {files:Item[]})
SDK Event type uses hyphen not underscore: installation.update-available vs installation.update_available
Align EventName registry with SDK Event type which uses hyphens: installation.update-available
Debug: Check the registryLayerOptions type definition
Fix duplicate content from previous bad edit
CoordinationClaimTable uses 'path' not 'file_path' as column name
Add CoordinationReservationTable import for path queries
Fix: query the reservation table (has path column) instead of claim table (no path column)
